idea-plugin.name: Dependency Manager for Gradle
idea-plugin.description:
Interactive dependency update review, done locally instead of through bot PRs. Open the tool window, read the release notes for each available update, untick what you don't want, and apply the rest as a single commit.
  • Scans Gradle build scripts, version catalogs (libs.versions.toml), the Gradle wrapper, and GitHub Actions workflows (SHA-pinned, tag-pinned, and moving-major refs).
  • Shows official GitHub release notes for each update.
  • Optionally verifies with a build before committing.
  • Ignore rules per dependency, version, or update type via .dependency-updates.toml.
